creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* Just forwarding the mail (with reformatting) so it will be recorded in
 * the gnats database.  By the way, it should be RESTRICTED, not NO_CDROM 

So, the previous mail was sent to freebsd-gnats-submit too?  Grumble.
I wish people wouldn't BCC: messages to other than oneself, it's
confusing. :<

Satoshi
